accessibility-audit.name: accessibility-audit
accessibility-audit.description: Deep WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit with Lighthouse, keyboard navigation, and screen reader validation
accessibility-audit.body_preview: # Accessibility Audit Deep accessibility audit against WCAG 2.1 AA standards. Goes beyond automated scans to include keyboard navigation testing, screen reader simulation, and manual contrast verifica

ai-evidence-analysis.name: ai-evidence-analysis
ai-evidence-analysis.description: AI-powered analysis of validation evidence using vision models for screenshots and LLM analysis for API responses and CLI output. Produces confidence scores (0-100) and structured findings per evidence item to augment human review.
ai-evidence-analysis.body_preview: # AI-Powered Evidence Analysis Intelligent analysis of captured validation evidence using vision models and LLMs. Produces confidence scores, structured findings, and verdict labels per evidence item

api-validation.name: api-validation
api-validation.description: API platform validation through direct HTTP requests (curl). Captures full response bodies, headers, and status codes as evidence. Tests CRUD operations, authentication flows, error responses, pagination, and rate limiting.

baseline-quality-assessment.name: baseline-quality-assessment
baseline-quality-assessment.description: Establishes a quality baseline before making changes. Captures current state evidence so post-change validation can prove improvement without regression.

build-quality-gates.name: build-quality-gates
build-quality-gates.description: Multi-stage build quality enforcement — compile, lint, type-check, bundle analysis
build-quality-gates.body_preview: # Build Quality Gates Multi-stage build quality enforcement. Each gate must PASS before proceeding to the next. Build gates verify that code compiles and meets structural quality standards — but build

chrome-devtools.name: chrome-devtools
chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools MCP integration for deep browser inspection and evidence capture
chrome-devtools.body_preview: # Chrome DevTools Deep browser inspection using the Chrome DevTools MCP server. Complements Playwright MCP with DevTools-specific capabilities: performance traces, network inspection, console monitori

cli-validation.name: cli-validation
cli-validation.description: CLI platform validation through direct binary execution. Captures stdout, stderr, exit codes, and pipe behavior as evidence. Validates happy paths, error handling, and output format correctness.

condition-based-waiting.name: condition-based-waiting
condition-based-waiting.description: Smart waiting strategies for async operations during validation. Waits for specific conditions rather than arbitrary sleep durations. Every wait has a timeout, a condition, and a failure path.

coordinated-validation.name: coordinated-validation
coordinated-validation.description: Multi-platform validation with dependency-aware execution. Validates platforms in dependency order (DB→API→Web, DB→API→iOS), runs independent platforms in parallel, blocks dependent platforms when dependencies fail, and coordinates evidence into a unified cross-platform report.
coordinated-validation.body_preview: # Coordinated Validation Multi-platform validation that respects cross-platform dependencies. Independent platforms run in parallel for speed; dependent platforms wait for their dependencies to pass b

create-validation-plan.name: create-validation-plan
create-validation-plan.description: Generates a structured validation plan with PASS criteria for every user journey before any evidence is captured. Plans define what success looks like upfront.

design-token-audit.name: design-token-audit
design-token-audit.description: Verify CSS and Tailwind tokens match the project's design system specification
design-token-audit.body_preview: # Design Token Audit Verify that implementation CSS, Tailwind classes, and inline styles match the project's design system specification. Detects hardcoded values, off-palette colors, non-standard spa

design-validation.name: design-validation
design-validation.description: Validate implementation fidelity against design specifications and Stitch-generated references
design-validation.body_preview: # Design Validation Validate that an implementation visually and structurally matches its design specification. Compares reference designs (from Stitch MCP, Figma exports, or DESIGN.md) against actual

django-validation.name: django-validation
django-validation.description: Django and Flask web application validation through server startup, database migration verification, curl endpoint testing, and Django admin checks. Captures HTTP responses, migration status, and server logs as evidence.

e2e-testing.name: e2e-testing
e2e-testing.description: End-to-end validation patterns — journey design, evidence management, flaky flow handling
e2e-testing.body_preview: # E2E Testing Patterns Patterns and strategies for designing end-to-end validation journeys, managing evidence artifacts, and handling flaky flows. This is a strategy skill — it tells you HOW to think

e2e-validate.name: e2e-validate
e2e-validate.description: Full end-to-end validation orchestrator. Detects platform, maps user journeys, defines PASS criteria, captures evidence, writes PASS/FAIL verdicts. Zero mocks. Supports iOS, React Native, Flutter, web, API, CLI, Django/Flask, and fullstack projects.

error-recovery.name: error-recovery
error-recovery.description: Structured 3-strike error recovery during validation. When validation fails, diagnoses root cause, applies fix, and re-validates. Use when any validation step fails, builds break, runtime crashes, or network/auth/database errors occur.

flutter-validation.name: flutter-validation
flutter-validation.description: Flutter platform validation through dependency installation, build, device launch, and screenshot capture via flutter screenshot. Captures logs, widget trees, and crash output as validation evidence across Android and iOS targets.

forge-benchmark.name: forge-benchmark
forge-benchmark.description: Measure validation posture across five dimensions. Track trends over time and compare against baseline targets.
forge-benchmark.body_preview: # forge-benchmark Measure validation posture across five dimensions. Track trends over time and compare against baseline targets.

forge-execute.name: forge-execute
forge-execute.description: Autonomous validation execution loop. Runs journeys against the real system, captures per-attempt evidence in isolated directories, fixes failures with rebuild-then-revalidate, and persists state to forge-state.json after every phase transition and strike.
forge-execute.body_preview: # forge-execute Autonomous validation execution loop. Runs journeys, captures fresh evidence per attempt, fixes failures, rebuilds, and re-validates until all pass or the 3-strike limit is reached.

forge-plan.name: forge-plan
forge-plan.description: Generate a validation plan with journey discovery, PASS criteria, and evidence requirements. Supports quick, standard, and consensus planning modes.
forge-plan.body_preview: # forge-plan Generate a validation plan with journey discovery, PASS criteria, and evidence requirements. Supports quick, standard, and consensus planning modes.

forge-setup.name: forge-setup
forge-setup.description: Initialize ValidationForge for a project. Detects platforms, scaffolds directories, installs enforcement hooks, and configures validation posture.
forge-setup.body_preview: # forge-setup Initialize ValidationForge for a project. Detects platforms, scaffolds directories, installs enforcement hooks, and configures validation posture.

forge-team.name: forge-team
forge-team.description: Multi-agent parallel validation. Spawns platform-specific validators that work in parallel with strict evidence directory ownership.
forge-team.body_preview: # forge-team Multi-agent parallel validation. Spawns platform-specific validators that work in parallel with strict evidence directory ownership. Uses dependency-aware wave execution so that upstream

full-functional-audit.name: full-functional-audit
full-functional-audit.description: Read-only validation audit that captures evidence and writes findings without making any code changes. Produces a severity-classified audit report.

fullstack-validation.name: fullstack-validation
fullstack-validation.description: Fullstack validation using strict bottom-up approach: Database -> API -> Frontend. Validates each layer independently, then tests integration across the entire stack. References api-validation and web-validation skills for layer-specific procedures.

functional-validation.name: functional-validation
functional-validation.description: Enforces end-user perspective validation through real system execution. Never write mocks or test files. Validate via simulator, browser, CLI, or cURL. Covers iOS, Web, API, CLI, and Full-Stack with evidence-based PASS/FAIL.

gate-validation-discipline.name: gate-validation-discipline
gate-validation-discipline.description: Enforces evidence-based validation before marking any gate, task, or checkpoint complete. Requires personal examination of evidence, specific proof citations, and evidence-to-criteria matching. Prevents premature completion claims.

ios-simulator-control.name: ios-simulator-control
ios-simulator-control.description: iOS Simulator lifecycle management — boot, install, launch, screenshot, logs, reset
ios-simulator-control.body_preview: # iOS Simulator Control Reference for all iOS Simulator lifecycle operations. Use these commands within ValidationForge validation flows to interact with real simulators.

ios-validation.name: ios-validation
ios-validation.description: iOS/macOS platform validation through Xcode build, simulator launch, and real device interaction via simctl and idb. Captures screenshots, video, and accessibility tree as validation evidence.

ios-validation-gate.name: ios-validation-gate
ios-validation-gate.description: Three-gate iOS validation — Simulator, Backend, Analysis — all must PASS
ios-validation-gate.body_preview: # iOS Validation Gate Three-gate enforcement for iOS applications. ALL gates must PASS before claiming completion. Each gate captures evidence to `e2e-evidence/`.

ios-validation-runner.name: ios-validation-runner
ios-validation-runner.description: Five-phase iOS validation with video recording, log streaming, and evidence collection
ios-validation-runner.body_preview: # iOS Validation Runner Five-phase protocol for capturing comprehensive iOS validation evidence: SETUP, RECORD, ACT, COLLECT, VERIFY.

no-mocking-validation-gates.name: no-mocking-validation-gates
no-mocking-validation-gates.description: Enforces the Iron Rule: never create mocks, stubs, test doubles, or test files. Detects mock-creation intent and redirects to real system validation. Works with pre-tool-use hooks to block test file creation at the enforcement layer.

parallel-validation.name: parallel-validation
parallel-validation.description: Orchestrate multiple validation agents in parallel across independent journeys or platforms
parallel-validation.body_preview: # Parallel Validation Orchestrate multiple validation agents working simultaneously on independent validation journeys. Maximizes throughput by running non-overlapping validations concurrently while m

playwright-validation.name: playwright-validation
playwright-validation.description: Browser-based validation using Playwright MCP — real browser interaction, evidence capture
playwright-validation.body_preview: # Playwright Validation Browser-based validation using Playwright MCP tools. Interacts with real running web applications, captures screenshots and DOM snapshots as evidence.

preflight.name: preflight
preflight.description: Pre-execution checklist before starting any validation. Ensures prerequisites are met: servers running, databases seeded, tools available. Auto-fixes common failures. Saves preflight report to e2e-evidence/.

production-readiness-audit.name: production-readiness-audit
production-readiness-audit.description: Systematic audit of application readiness for production deployment
production-readiness-audit.body_preview: # Production Readiness Audit Systematic multi-phase audit to determine if an application is ready for production deployment. Produces an evidence-backed readiness report with PASS/FAIL verdicts per ca

react-native-validation.name: react-native-validation
react-native-validation.description: React Native platform validation through Metro bundler startup, Expo/RN CLI build and launch, screenshot capture, log streaming, and deep link testing. Validates both iOS and Android targets via simulator/emulator or real device.

research-validation.name: research-validation
research-validation.description: Research standards, best practices, and tools before designing validation strategies
research-validation.body_preview: # Research Validation Research applicable standards, best practices, and available tools before designing a validation strategy. This is Phase 0 — the intelligence-gathering step that informs `create-

responsive-validation.name: responsive-validation
responsive-validation.description: Systematic viewport matrix testing with device-specific validation checks
responsive-validation.body_preview: # Responsive Validation Systematic validation across a device viewport matrix. Goes beyond basic screenshot comparison — validates layout behavior, touch targets, content parity, overflow, and respons

retrospective-validation.name: retrospective-validation
retrospective-validation.description: Validate methodologies and approaches using historical evidence and past results
retrospective-validation.body_preview: # Retrospective Validation Validate whether a methodology, process, or technical approach actually worked by analyzing historical evidence. Uses past validation results, deployment outcomes, and incid

rust-cli-validation.name: rust-cli-validation
rust-cli-validation.description: Rust CLI platform validation through cargo toolchain and direct binary execution. Runs cargo check, clippy, release build, and binary execution with real inputs. Captures stdout, stderr, exit codes, and pipe behavior as evidence. Validates compilation correctness, lint cleanliness, happy paths, error handling, and output format correctness.

sequential-analysis.name: sequential-analysis
sequential-analysis.description: Systematic root cause analysis for validation failures using step-by-step reasoning
sequential-analysis.body_preview: # Sequential Analysis When a validation produces a FAIL verdict, systematically trace the root cause through step-by-step reasoning. Uses the sequential-thinking MCP tool wrapped in ValidationForge's

stitch-integration.name: stitch-integration
stitch-integration.description: Stitch MCP workflow for design generation, iteration, and design-to-code validation
stitch-integration.body_preview: # Stitch Integration Manage the design-to-code pipeline using Stitch MCP. Generate reference designs from text prompts, iterate with variants, and produce design references for `design-validation` to

team-validation-dashboard.name: team-validation-dashboard
team-validation-dashboard.description: Aggregate team validation posture into a shared dashboard. Shows coverage, posture scores, regression trends, and ownership assignments across all registered projects.
team-validation-dashboard.body_preview: # team-validation-dashboard Aggregate team validation posture into a shared dashboard. Shows coverage, posture scores, regression trends, and ownership assignments across all registered projects.

validate-audit-benchmarks.name: validate-audit-benchmarks
validate-audit-benchmarks.description: Run automated benchmark suite to score hook correctness, skill/command structural integrity, and aggregate quality metrics.
validate-audit-benchmarks.body_preview: # Validate Audit Benchmarks Score the structural integrity and functional correctness of ValidationForge primitives.

verification-before-completion.name: verification-before-completion
verification-before-completion.description: Prevents premature completion claims by requiring personally examined evidence, specific citations, and criteria matching before marking any task complete. Use whenever completing tasks, closing gates, reporting to leads, or merging code.

visual-inspection.name: visual-inspection
visual-inspection.description: Evidence-based visual inspection of running UIs — captures what IS, not what SHOULD BE
visual-inspection.body_preview: # Visual Inspection Systematic visual inspection of running application UIs. Captures screenshots, describes what is ACTUALLY visible, and produces structured PASS/FAIL verdicts per checklist item wit

web-testing.description: Comprehensive web validation strategy — integration, E2E, accessibility, performance, security
web-testing.body_preview: # Web Testing Strategy Comprehensive web validation strategy covering integration, end-to-end, accessibility, performance, and security validation. All validation is performed against real running sys

web-validation.name: web-validation
web-validation.description: Web platform validation through browser automation (Playwright MCP or Chrome DevTools MCP). Captures screenshots, console logs, network responses, and DOM snapshots as evidence.
